subcodes.first_line: O ye two honored handmaidens of God! How blessed and fortunate were ye in your love for the Sovereign of the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز محترم حق چه قدر خوشبخت و نیک اختر بودید که در محبت شهریار سریر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement
